tasks.title: UI/UX Functional Audit
tasks.description: Systematically test all navigation flows, buttons, and error handling across all screens (Matchmaking, Profile, Thoughts, Chat Hub).
tasks.acceptance_criteria: All interactive elements work as expected; no navigation dead-ends; proper error state display.

tasks.title: Stability & Background Audio Verification
tasks.description: Ensure audio sessions remain active when screen is off or power button is pressed. Verify permission handling for microphone.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Call audio continues uninterrupted in all background scenarios on both iOS and Android.

tasks.title: Database security and RLS Audit
tasks.description: Review and harden Row Level Security (RLS) policies for all tables. Ensure users can only access their own data.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Security audit report showing 0 unauthorized data access vulnerabilities.

tasks.title: Race Condition & Signaling Stress Test
tasks.description: Scan SignalingService and backend for race conditions during matchmaking and call establishment. Fix potential crashes.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Signaling flow is robust under rapid connect/disconnect/skip scenarios.

tasks.title: UI Polish & Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Refine animations, check widget rebuild performance in lists, and ensure consistent design tokens.
